sections.paragraph:
verb ליתר (>>לייתר)

to make unnecessary, make redundant; avoid unnecessary use or expenditure, save; do unnecessary effort

masculine noun

chord; hypotenuse (geometry)

adjective

hyper-, over-, super-, extra-, moreover; great

masculine noun

the rest of, remainder, surplus, excess, the remains, overabundance

masculine noun יתר

the rest of, remainder, surplus, excess, the remains, overabundance
